$META stepping into the world of predictions markets

mark zuckerberg has reportedly directed meta to explore a standalone prediction markets app, internally known as "arena."

the experimental platform would operate separately from facebook and instagram, allowing users to engage with event-based forecasts and market predictions.

if launched, arena could emerge as a competitor to existing prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi, which currently lead the space.

Telegram is available in India again.

today i hit 2.2k followers.

i know it's not a massive milestone, but it means a lot to me.

over the past few months, i've gone all in on

the biggest win isn't the number - it's the growth.

i've built things i never thought i could, made incredible connections, grown my network, formed great partnerships, and most importantly, found some amazing friends and become a better version of myself. 

for someone who used to procrastinate a lot, that means everything.

update on this case:

- upon appeal binance cs asked for an recorded video of banking app and transaction while opening the app from app store i did that 

- the scammer did not do anything as asked by the cs

- he has been lying since hours with fake screenshots edited wrong dates and same utr in multiple random screenshots of payment lol in some ss the bank app and name mismatches and in some the dates are of past days lol

- the support team is slow and lazy and very biased towards the buyers don’t know why

- overall horrible and nightmare for an normal users the amount is small cannot imagine this with a huge chunk of money 

- trust broken will never use binance again

@binance @_RichardTeng @cz_binance

Got scammed on @Binance P2P over a small sale of 39.49 USDT.

The buyer submitted multiple fake payment screenshots:

• Screenshot #1: Bank name and payment app don’t match.
• Screenshot #2: Poorly edited image with obvious inconsistencies.
• Screenshot #3: Digital Rupee payment proof shows a date mismatch order was created on 23 June, while the screenshot is dated 22 June.

What’s even more concerning is that the buyer is openly claiming he has been doing this since 2017 and that neither Binance nor the police can do anything to him.

Is this really the level of protection users should expect from a world-class exchange?

P2P Order ID: 22902462192086794240

Requesting immediate review and action from the Binance P2P team.

Attached the merchant’s account name
